name: Mai Mai Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 Cups Hot Cooked Mashed Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crusts according to package instructions for one crust pies.
2. Place the crusts in the 9-inch pie pans.
3. Flute the edges to form high rims.
4. Combine the remaining crust ingredients in a small bowl and mix well.
5. Spread half the mixture evenly over the bottom of each pie pan.
6. Refrigerate.
7. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
8. Combine the sweet potatoes and butter in a medium bowl and mix well.
9. Set aside.
10. In a large bowl, combine the eggs and sugar. Beat thoroughly.
11. Add the sweet potato mixture and all the other remaining filling ingredients except the walnuts.
12. Mix thoroughly.
13. Stir in the walnuts.
14. Pour into the crust-lined pans.
15. Bake for 10 minutes at 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
16. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) and bake until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean (another 45-55 minutes).
17. Cool the pies completely.
18. Fold the orange peel into the thoroughly whipped cream and spread over the pies just before serving.
